title: Internal assertion error when constructing multiple instances
body:
Hi,

I am trying to implement an N-bit full adder. However, when I tell iverilog to compile my design, then I get an internal assertion error.

Trace:

```console
$ iverilog -o bin/wholeass -g2012 test_wholeass.sv -Wall
ivl: elab_scope.cc:1450: void PGModule::elaborate_scope_mod_instances_(Design*, Module*, NetScope*) const: Assertion `(msb == 0) || (lsb != 0)' failed.
Aborted
```

Source:

https://github.com/mcandre/toys/tree/13d507a19dc3ffdd7c5a46b4b36dc4da4e6ff676/rtl/systemverilog/wholeass

Icarus Verilog version 12.0 (devel) (s20150603-1148-gef01dd1e), on Ubuntu 20.04 Focal Fossa.

Am I doing something wrong?
code_blocks:
$ iverilog -o bin/wholeass -g2012 test_wholeass.sv -Wall
ivl: elab_scope.cc:1450: void PGModule::elaborate_scope_mod_instances_(Design*, Module*, NetScope*) const: Assertion `(msb == 0) || (lsb != 0)' failed.
Aborted
